calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Aug-18-2003 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on as a reassignment from the Presiding Judge's Department for trial by jury:
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerk S. Ravinantapricha, and CSR: Brenda Fields
Arnold Evje, II Esq. for Plaintiff San Francisco Housing Authority
Defendant Sonya Williams presents in pro per.
Parties met the chambers and reached a settlement by stipulation. Terms of the ORAL settlement were read into the record as follows:
Stipulation to enter Judgment or Upon Fulfillment of Condition, Dismissal of the case with prejudice. Plaintiff is entitled to a judgment against the defendant for restitution and possession of the premises of the property located at: 1060 Griffith St., San Francisco, CA.
Forfeiture of the rental agreement, back rent and costs of $5,320.72 from October 1, 2002 through September 30, 2003.
Issuance of an immediate WRIT of possession for the premises with NO STAY for any reason.
Defendant to vacate premises on September 30, 2003 by 5:00 p.m.
If Defendant complies, Plaintiff will waive back rent and Unlawful Detainer damages and Defendant will dismiss the action with prejudice.
If Defendant fails to do so, Plaintiff may so state by EX PARTE declaration, with 24 hours notice to defendant and have judgment entered, with no stay for any reason. Defendant waives any right to make a motion to set aside, vacate any judgment, stay of execution or relief from forfeiture.
Each party waives any claim against the other and generally releases the other from all claims.
If defendant is evicted, any personal property left at the premises is deemed abandoned and may be disposed of by the Plaintiff.
Defendant represents that there is no one else occupying the premises who claims a right to possession. Each side will bear its own costs and attorney fees.
All parties agreed to the settlement in open court.
Counsel to prepare Stipulation for Entry of Judgment.

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-14-2003 Text Ruling

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-21-2003 Overruled
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. Tentative ruling adopted -- DEFENDANT SONYA WILLIAMS' DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT -- Overruled, 5 days leave answer. (DEW/301/EH) Reporter: Candace Yount, #2737
